The sqrt term `c2*sqrt(c^2+c3)` adds a smooth sub-linear-in-magnitude contribution that complements the linear autocatalysis.

I'll implement the breakthrough idea exactly as specified, since the c2=0 reduction guarantees the multistart cannot do worse than the current best (subject only to the small parsimony penalty).
